2026-06-16T13:44:59.0763315Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0763512Z [36;1m# Write gdb command file.[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0763785Z [36;1m# Uses Python event hooks so that:[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0764188Z [36;1m#   - on a fatal signal  → prints full backtrace and exits gdb with code 1[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0764652Z [36;1m#   - on a clean exit    → exits gdb with the inferior's own exit code[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0765132Z [36;1m# (Plain 'quit' in gdb --batch always exits 0, even after SIGSEGV with nopass.)[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0765552Z [36;1mGDB_CMD_FILE=$(mktemp /tmp/gdb_cmds.XXXXXX)[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0765870Z [36;1mcat > "$GDB_CMD_FILE" << 'GDBEOF'[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0766147Z [36;1mset pagination off[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0766383Z [36;1mset confirm off[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0766627Z [36;1mset print thread-events off[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0766878Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0767080Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0767297Z [36;1m_crash_signal = [None][0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0767542Z [36;1m_inf_exit_code = [0][0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0767787Z [36;1mdef _stop_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0768111Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'stop_signal') and event.stop_signal:[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0768467Z [36;1m        _crash_signal[0] = event.stop_signal[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0768756Z [36;1mdef _exit_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0769098Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'exit_code') and event.exit_code is not None:[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0769697Z [36;1m        _inf_exit_code[0] = event.exit_code[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0770051Z [36;1mgdb.events.stop.connect(_stop_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0770427Z [36;1mgdb.events.exited.connect(_exit_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0771241Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0771548Z [36;1mhandle SIGSEGV stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0771837Z [36;1mhandle SIGABRT stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0772196Z [36;1mhandle SIGBUS  stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0772514Z [36;1mrun[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0772707Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0772997Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0773284Z [36;1msig = _crash_signal[0][0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0773608Z [36;1mif sig:[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0773942Z [36;1m    print("\n\n========== GDB CRASH REPORT ==========")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0774302Z [36;1m    print("Signal caught: " + str(sig))[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0774936Z [36;1m    print("--- Crashed thread backtrace (full) ---")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0775264Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0775673Z [36;1m    print("\n--- All threads backtrace ---")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0776007Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("thread apply all bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0776441Z [36;1m    print("=======================================")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0776848Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit 1")[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0777190Z [36;1melse:[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0777408Z [36;1m    code = _inf_exit_code[0] or 0[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0777687Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit %d" % code)[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0778050Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T13:44:59.0778243Z [36;1mGDBEOF[0m

2026-06-16T13:48:13.5377012Z ##[warning]Node.js 20 actions are deprecated. The following actions are running on Node.js 20 and may not work as expected: actions/cache@v3, actions/checkout@v3, actions/setup-python@v4, jwlawson/actions-setup-cmake@v1.13. Actions will be forced to run with Node.js 24 by default starting June 16th, 2026. Node.js 20 will be removed from the runner on September 16th, 2026. Please check if updated versions of these actions are available that support Node.js 24. To opt into Node.js 24 now, set the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true environment variable on the runner or in your workflow file. Once Node.js 24 becomes the default, you can temporarily opt out by setting ACTIONS_ALLOW_USE_UNSECURE_NODE_VERSION=true. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/
